nasb.text: Some of the sons of Judah, of the sons of Benjamin and of the sons of Ephraim and Manasseh lived in Jerusalem:

esv.text: And some of the people of Judah, Benjamin, Ephraim, and Manasseh lived in Jerusalem:

cnv.text: 在耶路撒冷居住的，有猶大支派、便雅憫支派、以法蓮支派和瑪拿西支派的人。

ccb.text: 一些犹大人、便雅悯人、以法莲人和玛拿西人住在耶路撒冷，
